case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY AM/PM BAIL BONDS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY AM/PM BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT FRONTIER PACIFIC INSURANCE COMPANY AM/PM BAIL BONDS
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
